response.justification: Meets the 15-year experience minimum with current work in AI-agent infrastructure; however, lacks the deep AI/ML specialization, cloud platform strategy background, and demonstrated customer advisory experience preferred for this Principal-level strategic role. The technical breadth is solid but the positioning is generalist engineer rather than recognized AI strategy expert.
strengths: 16+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq for 14+ months
Demonstrated leadership through Staff roles, technical mentorship, open source projects, and community workshops
concerns: Limited deep AI/ML expertise—background is general software engineering, not AI/ML specialization or research
No demonstrated cloud platform strategy, product roadmapping, or strategic customer advisory experience
Current Staff Engineer title below the Principal/Director-level IC required; no evidence of organization-wide strategic influence
